---
title: "Templates"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Download ready-to-use templates for security policies, cloud configurations, project documentation, and technical planning."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, image]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Document <span class="gr">Templates</span></h1>
    <p>Ready-to-use templates for common business and technical documents.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Available Templates</h2>
    <p class="sub">Create professional documents quickly and consistently.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security Policy Template</h3><p>A comprehensive security policy template covering all major security domains in accordance with industry standards like ISO 27001.</p><span class="m-tag">Security</span> <span class="m-tag">Policy</span><br><small>Formats: Word, PDF, Markdown</small></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><h3>Project Documentation Template</h3><p>A structured template for technical project documentation, including requirements, architecture, testing, and deployment sections.</p><span class="m-tag">Project</span> <span class="m-tag">Documentation</span><br><small>Formats: Word, PDF, Markdown</small></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i><h3>Risk Assessment Template</h3><p>A structured template for conducting and documenting risk assessments, including risk identification, analysis, and treatment plans.</p><span class="m-tag">Security</span> <span class="m-tag">Risk</span><br><small>Formats: Excel, PDF</small></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bell"></i><h3>Incident Response Plan Template</h3><p>A comprehensive incident response plan template covering preparation, identification, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned.</p><span class="m-tag">Security</span> <span class="m-tag">Incident Response</span><br><small>Formats: Word, PDF, Markdown</small></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Quarto & Typst Templates</h2>
    <p class="sub">Specialized templates for academic and technical writing.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i><h3>Quarto Manuscript Template</h3><p>A ready-to-use template for creating technical papers and research manuscripts with Quarto, supporting multiple output formats including HTML, PDF, and MS Word.</p><ul><li>Professional academic styling</li><li>Citation and bibliography support</li><li>Code integration for data science</li><li>Multiple output formats</li></ul><a href="quarto-manuscript-template.zip" class="m-lk" download>Download Template</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i><h3>Typst Technical Report Template</h3><p>A professionally designed Typst template for technical reports and documentation with modern typography and layout.</p><ul><li>Clean, modern design</li><li>Optimized for technical content</li><li>Customizable styling</li><li>Fast compilation</li></ul><span class="m-tag">Coming Soon</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Customization Tips</h2>
    <p class="sub">Get the most out of our templates.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-palette"></i><h3>Branding</h3><p>Replace placeholder logos and colors with your organization's branding.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i><h3>Content</h3><p>Update sections to reflect your specific needs and requirements.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i><h3>Legal Review</h3><p>Have legal counsel review policy templates before implementation.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><h3>Version Control</h3><p>Track changes and maintain version history for all documents.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Template License</h2>
    <p>All templates are provided under a <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/">Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License</a>, which means you can use, modify, and distribute them freely with attribution to chen.ist.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom template?</h2>
    <p>We can create templates tailored to your organization's needs.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Get in touch</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free consultation &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom branding &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Multiple formats
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
